'''zosakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnastic|gymnastic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnastic|gymnastic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zosakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosakithi|zosakithi]] || [[word:zosakiji|zosakiji]] || [[word:zosakishi|zosakishi]] || [[word:zosakiki|zosakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosakuthuthu|zosakuthuthu]] || [[word:zosakujuju|zosakujuju]] || [[word:zosakushushu|zosakushushu]] || [[word:zosakukuku|zosakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosakuthu|zosakuthu]] || [[word:zosakuju|zosakuju]] || [[word:zosakushu|zosakushu]] || [[word:zosakuku|zosakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosakufthuf|zosakufthuf]] || [[word:zosakufjuf|zosakufjuf]] || [[word:zosakufshuf|zosakufshuf]] || [[word:zosakufkuf|zosakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosakethe|zosakethe]] || [[word:zosakeje|zosakeje]] || [[word:zosakeshe|zosakeshe]] || [[word:zosakeke|zosakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosakothotho|zosakothotho]] || [[word:zosakojojo|zosakojojo]] || [[word:zosakoshosho|zosakoshosho]] || [[word:zosakokoko|zosakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosakotho|zosakotho]] || [[word:zosakojo|zosakojo]] || [[word:zosakosho|zosakosho]] || [[word:zosakoko|zosakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosakofthof|zosakofthof]] || [[word:zosakofjof|zosakofjof]] || [[word:zosakofshof|zosakofshof]] || [[word:zosakofkof|zosakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfthÃŸf|zosakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfjÃŸf|zosakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfshÃŸf|zosakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfkÃŸf|zosakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zosakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zosakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zosakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zosakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfthÃŸf|zosakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfjÃŸf|zosakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfshÃŸf|zosakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfkÃŸf|zosakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfthÃŸf|zosakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfjÃŸf|zosakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfshÃŸf|zosakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zosakÃŸfkÃŸf|zosakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zosakÃḊthÃḊ|zosakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zosakÃḊjÃḊ|zosakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zosakÃḊshÃḊ|zosakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zosakÃḊkÃḊ|zosakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zosakathatha|zosakathatha]] || [[word:zosakajaja|zosakajaja]] || [[word:zosakashasha|zosakashasha]] || [[word:zosakakaka|zosakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zosakatha|zosakatha]] || [[word:zosakaja|zosakaja]] || [[word:zosakasha|zosakasha]] || [[word:zosakaka|zosakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zosakafthaf|zosakafthaf]] || [[word:zosakafjaf|zosakafjaf]] || [[word:zosakafshaf|zosakafshaf]] || [[word:zosakafkaf|zosakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zosakasha|zosakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosakshÃḋsha|zosakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosakrosha|zosakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosakmusha|zosakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosakyasha|zosakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosaknkshÃḋsha|gozosaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosaknkrosha|gozosaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosaknkmusha|gozosaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosaknkyasha|gozosaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zosasakasha|zosasakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosasakshÃḋsha|zosasakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosasakrosha|zosasakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosasakmusha|zosasakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosasakyasha|zosasakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosasaknkshÃḋsha|gozosasaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosasaknkrosha|gozosasaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosasaknkmusha|gozosasaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosasaknkyasha|gozosasaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zesÃḊkasha|zesÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zesÃḊkshÃḋsha|zesÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zesÃḊkrosha|zesÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zesÃḊkmusha|zesÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zesÃḊkyasha|zesÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozesÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gozesÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozesÃḊknkrosha|gozesÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozesÃḊknkmusha|gozesÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozesÃḊknkyasha|gozesÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zosfakasha|zosfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zosfakshÃḋsha|zosfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zosfakrosha|zosfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zosfakmusha|zosfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zosfakyasha|zosfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozosfaknkshÃḋsha|gozosfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozosfaknkrosha|gozosfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozosfaknkmusha|gozosfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozosfaknkyasha|gozosfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
